MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556
  • Home
  • Development Library
  • Examples
  • Release Notes
MWCapture SDKv3 Release Notes

Introduction

This section describes the changes between Magewell Capture SDK 3.3 (hereafter called "MWCaptureSDK 3.3" or "MWCaptureSDK3.3.x.x") and earlier versions, to help developers get a better understanding of how to use the latest SDK. We highly recommend users of Magewell SDK read these important release notes.

MWCaptureSDK 3.3 is the latest SDK, which integrates and replaces SDKv2. We highly recommend users of any older versions upgrade to MWCaptureSDK 3.3 immediately for better support.

We've used the same API definitions in MWCaptureSDK 3.3.x.x as we did in SDKv2. Developers simply need to modify the directory of header files and library files that they have included in their SDKv2-based development environment. Developers do not need to modify how they call APIs in their development nor recompile the application when they update to the latest Run-time library (Magewell Capture Runtime 3.3.x.x). For users of SDKv2, please refer to the directory called "SDKv2". Please also note that Magewell will keep the "SDKv3" in an active mode in the future.

System Requirements

Supported OS

Windows 10/11/Server 2016/Server 2019/Server 2022 (x86&x64) and above.

Supported Hardware
Family Name SDKv2 SDKv3
First Generation Capture Device Y N
Pro Capture Family Y Y
USB Capture Family Y Y
USB Capture Plus Family Y Y
ECO Capture Family Y Y

Note: Available APIs depend on the capabilities of the particular Magewell capture hardware you are using. For example, APIs like OSD and LowLatency work with Pro Capture hardware but not the USB Capture, USB Capture Plus and Eco Capture families.

Release Notes

2026-02-02
  1. Optimize the performance of the DirectX rendering library for YUY2, YUYV, UYVY, YVYU, VYUY and other similar formats.
  2. Fix the issue where the MWGetAudioCaptureSupportFormat interface may hang when acquiring audio devices.
  3. Update corresponding interface for the mw_venc library after updating the Nvidia driver to version 590 or above.
  4. Fix the system crash issue that may occur when the AVCapture routine captures in 4K resolution BGRA format.
  5. Fix the rendering failure issue of the DirectX rendering library when using the V308 capture format.
  6. Add support for the USB Capture Pro family.
  7. Add support for capture and rendering of the Y210 format.
2023-03-02
  • Add C++ class: Easy to Use C++ Capture Interface SDKv3\Examples\VC++\all_example\common\mw_capture\mw_capture.h
  • Add C# class: Easy to Use C# Capture Interface SDKv3\Examples\C#\all_example\common\mw_capture\mw_capture.cs
  • Path of previous VC++ examples changes from SDKv3\Examples\VC++ to SDKv3\Examples\Legacy_VC++
  • Path of previous C# examples changes from SDKv3\Examples\C# to SDKv3\Examples\Legacy_C#
  • Add the following C++ examples in SDKv3\Examples\VC++:
    • av_view captures and plays the audio and video.
    • av_view_sharpen sharpens your video. You can find a slider at the top of the window to adjust parameters about sharpening.
    • low_latency_view demonstrates the process of low latency capture, and comparison of the low-latency with normal capture.
    • board_id_capture is a command-line program, demonstrating how to access device through board_ID and channel_ID.
    • color_conditioning is a command-line program, demonstrating how to adjust the contrast, brightness, saturation and chroma, and generate 5 pictures, which have different contrast, brightness, saturation and chroma by using MWCapture SDKv3 Pro Capture Functions.
    • color_conditioning2 is a command-line program, demonstrating how to adjust the contrast, brightness, saturation and chroma, and generate 5 pictures, which have different contrast, brightness, saturation and chroma by using MWCapture SDKv3 Universal Functions.
    • crop_capture is a command-line program, demonstrating how to crop pictures and generate 5 pictures which are cropped in different ways.
    • gpu_encode is a command line program, demonstrating that GPU hardware acceleration the encoding of the captured video into H264 and h265 streams, and saves them to gpuenc.h264 or gpuenc.h265.
    • low_latency is a command line program, demonstrating the process of low latency capture, and comparison of the low-latency with normal capture.
    • mp4_muxer is a command line program, demonstrating the process of MP4 packaging and generation of h264_aac_cc608.mp4 file.
  • Add the following C# examples in SDKv3\Examples\C#:
    • av_record demonstrates audio and video capture, play, encoding, recording, and packaging to a test.mp4 file.
    • av_view demonstrates audio and video capture and playback.
    • av_view_quad demonstrates synchronized capture with multiple devices and previews four channels in one screen.
    • av_view_sharpen sharpens your video developed based on av_view. You can find a slider at the right of the window to adjust parameters about sharpening.
    • color_conditioning is a command-line program, demonstrating how to adjust the contrast, brightness, saturation and chroma, and generate 5 pictures, which have different contrast, brightness, saturation and chroma by using MWCapture SDKv3 Pro Capture Functions.
    • color_conditioning2 is a command-line program, demonstrating how to adjust the contrast, brightness, saturation and chroma, and generate 5 pictures, which have different contrast, brightness, saturation and chroma by using MWCapture SDKv3 Universal Functions.
    • gpu_encode_gui is a GPU hardware encoding program base on av_view. And it saves a test.h264 file by h264 encoding.
2020-09-27
  • Added Python applications. For details, refer to Python.
  • Updated AVCapture C++ to capture, render and encode 4K 60fps signals with proper GPUs or CPUs.
  • Added hardware encoders to fully utilize the hardware capability of the host computer.
June 29, 2020
  1. Added MP4 recording module. For details, refer to MP4.
    • Header file
    • Library file: mw_mp4.lib mw_mp4.dll
  2. Added Mp4Repair C++, which repairs damaged MP4 recorded with MP4.
  3. Optimized AVCapture C++, which is capable of recoding MP4 files instead of flv files.
  4. Updated HDRCapture C++, which integrates the IMGUI to build the GUI frame, encodes with GPU Hardware Encoding, and records MP4 files using MP4.
  5. Updated MWCCPlayer_DRLib C++, which integrates the IMGUI to build the GUI frame, encodes with GPU Hardware Encoding, and records MP4 files with MP4.
  6. Added support for the capture card recovery by calling MWSetPostReconfig.
  7. Optimized GetANCPacket C++, which provides custom parameters for capturing ANC data.
October 24, 2019
  1. Added hardware video encoding module. For details, refer to GPU Hardware Encoding.
    • Added hardware video encoding library. For details, refer to the following files:
      • Header file.
      • Library file: mw_venc.lib mw_venc.dll
    • Added hardware video encoding application MWVencEncode C++, which provides features of capturing, encoding and saving video data.
    • Added hardware video encoding library file GPU Hardware Encoding.
  2. Optimized SDKv3 documentation.
    • Optimized API document.
    • Added cross-reference across APIs, examples and feature description documents.
  3. Optimized SDKv3 Applications.
    • Added CaptureByField C++.
    • Optimized example performance by capturing BGR24 instead of capturing BGRA.
  4. Optimized SDKv3 libraries.
    • Fixed a few bugs.
    • Added the following interfaces:
      • MWGetVideoCaptureSupportColorFormat
      • MWGetVideoCaptureSupportResolutionMode
      • MWGetVideoCaptureSupportRangeResolution
      • MWGetVideoCaptureSupportListResolution
      • MWGetVideoProcParamRange
      • MWGetVideoProcParam
      • MWSetVideoProcParam
      • MWGetAudioDeviceInfo
      • MWGetAudioDeviceInfoByIndex
      • MWUSBGetVideoCaptureSupportFrameRate
      • MWUSBGetVideoCaptureSupportFrameRateEx
December 20, 2018

Optimized Magewell APIs and Examples in SDKv3

  1. Fixed audio device enumeration issues caused by specific APIs of the SDK.
  2. Fixed the occasiontal problem of failing to pop up the USB plugin/unplugged notification.
  3. Added support for MinGW.
  4. Optimized document of SDKv3 Example.
  5. Optimized SDKv3 examples for C++, C#, VB, Java.
    • For C++ examples:
      1. Modularized all cmd examples to make it easy to read.
      2. Added support to cmd examples for Qt.
      3. Added function of CaptureByInput: outputting the same frame rate as the input interlaced signals, for example, input 30i signal, and output 30p video.
      4. Modified the signal detection mechanism of AudioCapture, AVCapture, MulitAudioCapture.
      5. Updated windows Direct3D video rendering. Supported multiple color formats rendering and color space conversion.
      6. Fixed the issue that the AVCapture saved flv files with wrong number of frames in the attribute.
      7. Updated AVCapture2. Add support to audio enumeration and switch of audio input channel.
      8. Add function to MultiAudioCapture. When a multi-channel device is used, it can capture video from one channel and audio from another two channels. Add multi-channel audio rendering based on DSound. Support all the audio compress format in IEC 61937 standard.
      9. Optimized NDISender capture workflow, and updated NDI SDK to 3.7.
      10. Optimized HDRCapture rendering process, which makes it preview HDR effect in real time while setting the parameters, and fixed the recording properties issues.
    • For C# examples: optimized rendering of all C# examples. Supported multiple color formats and image flip.
    • For VB examples:
      1. Optimized rendering of all VB examples, and supported multiple color formats and image flip.
      2. Supported multiple color formats and image flip.
    • For Java examples:
      1. Optimized rendering of all Java examples, and supported multiple color formats and image flip.
      2. Supported development and deployment a javascript with Eclipse. Add batch processing command script (.bat) on Windows.
April 28, 2018

  1. Added Closed Caption in SDKv3 supported by Pro Capture SDI, Pro Capture Dual SDI, Pro Capture Quad SDI, Pro Capture AIO 4K and Pro Capture AIO 4K Plus.

    Added related sample applications:

    • MWCCPlayer_DShow: to capture, decode and render closed caption signals based on DirectShow.
    • MWCCPlayer_DRLib: to capture, decode and render closed caption signals based on Magewell API.

    Added related documentation:

    Closed Caption: how to decode and render closed caption signals using the CC samples.

  2. Added HDR10 in SDKv3 supported by Pro Capture HDMI 4K, Pro Capture HDMI 4K Plus, Pro Capture HDMI 4K Plus LT, Pro Capture AIO 4K and Pro Capture AIO 4K Plus.

    Added related sample application:

    HDRCapture: to capture, decode and render HDR signal based on Magewell API.

    Added related documentation:

    HDRCapture: how to preview and record HDR signals using the HDRCapture sample.

  3. Added multi-languange examples including C/C++/VC++, C#, VB and Java in SDKv3.

    Added related sample application:

    • VC++: AVCapture, LowLatency, OSDPreview, etc.
    • C#: AVCaptureCSharp.
    • VisualBasic: AVCaptureVB, GetANCPacket, etc.
    • Java: Avcapture, Avcapture2, etc.

  4. Eco Capture family supports to capture audio and video through Magewell API in SDKv3.

    Added related sample application:

    AVCapture: to capture audio and video through Magewell API using Pro Capture and Eco Capture Family devices.

January 22, 2018

New Features

We've added a couple of APIs within SDKv3 directory of MWCaptureSDK 3.3 to support USB Capture Family, USB Capture Plus Family and Eco Capture Family. Developers can get property settings of these families and capture video and audio via these APIs.

Added sample applications are shown as below:

  • USBDeviceDetect: to detect the device state of the USB capture device when it is being hot-plugged or re-connected.
  • AVCapture2: to capture audio and video.

Binary Package

Unlike the earlier XI_SDK and MWCaptureSDK, which were provided as .ZIP files, MWCaptureSDK 3.3.x.x has been packed as binary files including the SDK for developers (Magewell Capture SDK 3.3.x.x.exe) and the Run-time library to be installed on end-users’ computers (Magewell Capture Runtime 3.3.x.x.exe).

The Run-time library, which was previously found in the Bin file (such as LibMWCapture.dll), will be installed in the Windows directory (with a 64-bit OS, both 64-bit and 32-bit libraries will be installed in the Windows directory). The directory structure and contents of Include, Lib and Examples remain almost unchanged.

About Re-distribution

If any parts of MWCaptureSDK 3.3 are included in developers' software releases to end users, they should redistribute the product together with the MWCaptureRT.exe in the MWCaptureSDK 3.3.x.x, using a silent installation. Developers are not permitted to copy or move any files within Magewell's Run-time library to their products for release. (Please refer to MWCaptureSDK 3.3.x.x.rtf for more details).
